mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month momentum in INDPRO raises expected corporate sales volumes and operating leverage, so positive industrial production trend predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month INDPRO momentum does not produce a positive 20-day return spread versus lower momentum in walk-forward tests, or Rank IC is below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS crosses above 4.0%, the discount-rate burden on equity cash flows dominates near-term earnings growth, so high policy-rate regimes predict negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered FEDFUNDS-above-4.0 observations generate positive 20-day returns in more than 60% of cases or have mean returns above the unconditional mean with p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A low UNRATE combined with rising PAYEMS signals durable household income and contained recession risk, so tight labor markets with payroll expansion predict positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE below 3.8% and PAYEMS rises over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition of UNRATE below 3.8% and 3-month PAYEMS growth produces negative average 60-day returns or underperforms the unconditional 60-day return in walk-forward evaluation.

mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in RSAFS indicates resilient nominal consumption demand, which supports revenue expectations for index constituents and predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS momentum has non-positive average 20-day forward returns or a walk-forward Rank IC below 0.03 for two consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp fall in HOUST signals weakening rate-sensitive demand and future construction-sector earnings pressure, so housing-start contractions predict negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls more than 10% over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST contractions are followed by positive 60-day returns in more than 60% of observations or if the triggered mean return exceeds the unconditional 60-day mean.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating CPIAUCSL while FEDFUNDS is above 4.0% signals persistent inflation pressure and reduced scope for policy easing, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth exceeds 4% and FEDFUNDS is above 4.0%
regime_hint: restrictive monetary policy with inflation persistence
failure_condition: Reject if the joint inflation-and-high-rate trigger has positive average 5-day returns or if its downside hit rate is not above 55% in out-of-sample walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Positive quarterly growth in GDPC1 indicates broad real demand expansion, which raises expected index-level earnings and predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 rises versus the prior quarter
failure_condition: Reject if positive quarterly GDPC1 growth fails to deliver higher 60-day returns than non-positive GDPC1 growth, or if the return spread is negative in two consecutive 5-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in UNRATE signals deterioration in labor demand and rising recession probability, so unemployment-rate acceleration predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE acceleration triggers are followed by positive 20-day returns in more than 60% of cases or if triggered returns are not below unconditional returns at p < 0.10.
